title: perezia recurvata
intro: Perezia recurvata, also known as the Mexican perezia or recurved perezia, is a perennial plant native to Mexico and Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and relieve symptoms of fever and cough. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting immune function. Perezia recurvata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of ailments.
